prompt_en: Drivers must always obey traffic signals, even when no other vehicles are present.
explanation_en: Traffic signals must be obeyed at all times.
raw_text: Drivers must always obey traffic signals, even when no other vehicles are present.

prompt_en: The speed limit on expressways in Japan is typically 100 km/h.
explanation_en: Expressway speed limits are typically 100 km/h.

prompt_en: Drivers must yield to pedestrians at all crosswalks.
explanation_en: Pedestrian priority is a fundamental rule.

prompt_en: Drivers must check tire pressure regularly for safe operation.
explanation_en: Proper tire pressure is essential for safety.
raw_text: Drivers must check tire pressure regularly.

prompt_en: Parking is prohibited within 5 meters of a fire hydrant.
explanation_en: Fire hydrant access must remain clear.

prompt_en: Drivers must reduce speed in adverse weather conditions.
raw_text: Drivers must reduce speed in adverse weather conditions.

prompt_en: Drivers must stop at railroad crossings when warning lights are flashing.

prompt_en: Drivers must display the novice sign for the first year after obtaining their license.
